response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video for vocal music components. 2. Determined that the audio track is entirely instrumental background music throughout the duration of the credits and title card. 3. Since no vocal music is present, no lyrics searches were conducted. 4. Created scene mapping based on the transition from the scrolling credits to the final static title card.
response.global_summary: The video shows the closing credits for a project titled 'The Rise of the Nut Warrior', featuring a series of character animations and game scenes accompanied by instrumental music. There is no vocal music throughout the video.

scenes.description: The video features a scrolling list of credits for 'The Rise of the Nut Warrior' alongside various animated scenes and in-game footage. The audio is purely instrumental background music.
The video ends on a static title card for 'The Rise of the Nut Warrior'. The audio remains instrumental background music.
